title: Microsoft Work IQ Activity Signal
description: Schema for activity signals from the Microsoft Work IQ / Copilot analytics layer, surfaced via Microsoft Graph beta endpoints or MCP context layer. These signals capture both human app-usage telemetry and Copilot agent interactions across M365.

id.description: Unique identifier for this activity signal

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the activity occurred

actionType.description: Type of activity. Copilot-prefixed actions indicate agent involvement.

appHost.description: The M365 application where the activity occurred

userPrincipalName.description: Azure AD user principal name (e.g. user@contoso.com)

sessionId.description: Correlation ID grouping related activities within a work session

copilotUsed.description: Whether Microsoft Copilot was involved in this activity

copilotPrompt.description: The natural language prompt sent to Copilot (present for copilot.invoke actions)

copilotResponse.description: The response generated by Copilot (present for copilot.completion actions)

copilotModel.description: The LLM model used by Copilot for this interaction

copilotConfidence.description: Copilot's confidence score for the generated response

pluginName.description: Name of the Copilot plugin/tool invoked (for copilot.toolCall actions)

pluginInvocations.description: Details of plugin/tool calls made by Copilot during this interaction

resourceUrl.description: URL of the resource being acted upon (document, email, page)

resourceType.description: Type of the M365 resource involved

participants.description: List of participant UPNs (for meetings, shared documents, emails)

durationMs.description: Duration of the activity in milliseconds

sensitivityLabel.description: Microsoft Information Protection sensitivity label on the resource

clientVersion.description: Version of the M365 client application
